task_completion.description: The agent accessed the Floreant POS Back Office.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Floreant POS Back Office window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Menu Groups explorer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or tab titled 'Menu Group Explorer' (or similar) is open, displaying a list of existing menu groups.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the dialog to add a new Menu Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for creating or editing a Menu Group is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the required details for the new Menu Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Breakfast Specials' is typed into the Name field, and an existing category is selected in the Category dropdown.

task_completion.description: The new Menu Group was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Breakfast Specials' menu group is now visible as an entry in the Menu Group Explorer list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Floreant POS graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Floreant POS application windows, buttons, and text fields.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database clients to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL INSERT commands or database client tools (like ij or DBeaver) are used to create the menu group.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Floreant POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used matches the visual appearance of Floreant POS, not a text editor or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is Floreant POS. The correct navigation path to create a menu group is Back Office > Explorers > Menu Groups > Add. The Admin PIN is 1111. The expected name for the new group is 'Breakfast Specials'. Menu groups require both a Name and a Category assignment to be valid and visible.
